description_long: This is a dark-colored SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design and a robust stance, suitable for urban and suburban environments. The vehicle features four passenger doors, large tinted windows, and a pair of sunroofs on the roof panel. The body is finished in a matte or semi-gloss black or dark gray, with subtle weathering and dirt marks visible on the surfaces, suggesting regular use. The wheels are prominent, featuring a five-spoke alloy design with a metallic finish. Both the front and rear license plates are visible, and the headlights and taillights are integrated into the bodywork with a minimalist style. The overall appearance is modern yet practical, with a focus on durability and everyday functionality.
description: A dark, boxy SUV with four doors, tinted windows, dual sunroofs, and five-spoke alloy wheels, showing signs of urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, including two doors, tinted windows, and the five-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the tailgate, rear window, taillights, and the license plate.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar to the left, with two doors and alloy wheels visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the grille, headlights, front bumper, and the license plate.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke alloy wheels with a split-spoke pattern and metallic finish
